channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Hajj 2026 preparations continue as ministry assures no flight suspensions
item.description: The Ministry of Religious Affairs and Interfaith Harmony has officially dismissed media claims suggesting that Hajj flights for 2026 might be suspended due to tensions in the Middle East, terming such...

item.title: Tanzania Seeks Clear Legal Framework to Support Startups
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Stakeholders within Tanzania’s startup ecosystem are urging the government to provide a clearer legal and regulatory framework for startups as the country prepares its first national s...

item.title: Bobi Wine flees Uganda citing military hunt after disputed election
item.description: Ugandan opposition leader Bobi Wine has announced that he has fled the country, saying he is escaping a military search mounted against him after a heavily disputed presidential election held on Janua...

item.title: Government to continue flood control investigation despite ICI ending operations
item.description: Malacañang clarified that the government will maintain its investigation into anomalous flood control projects even as the Independent Commission for Infrastructure (ICI) concludes its operations at t...

item.title: Shalimar Express Collides with Goods Train in Naushahro Feroze, One Dead and Thirteen Injured
item.description: On Sunday, a serious accident took place at Lakha Road Railway Station in Naushahro Feroze district, Sindh, when the Lahore-bound Shalimar Express collided with a stationary goods train. According to ...

item.title: Calgary Home Listed at $7.8 Million Offers River Views
item.description: A luxurious new property in Calgary has been listed for $7.8 million, offering sweeping views of the Elbow River. This residence stands out not only for its prime location but also for its modern arch...

item.title: Study Reveals How Cats Use Their Spines to Land Safely
item.description: Researchers at Yamaguchi University in Japan have uncovered new insights into how cats manage to land on their feet after falling. The study, published in The Anatomical Record, focuses on the mechani...

item.title: UK explores measures to ensure safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz amid Iran tensions
item.description: The United Kingdom is examining all possible measures, in coordination with the US and other allies, to ensure the security of the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial shipping channel for global oil and other...

item.title: Mudavadi engages Russian authorities on safety and repatriation of Kenyans amid Russia-Ukraine conflict
item.description: Prime Cabinet Secretary and Foreign Affairs CS Musalia Mudavadi has flown to Moscow for high-level talks with Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov. His visit focuses on protecting Kenyans reportedly...

item.title: Ukraine Seeks Funding and Technology for Sharing Drone Defence Expertise with Gulf Countries Against Iranian Drones
item.description: President Volodymyr Zelenskiy of Ukraine has announced that his country is providing expert help to Middle Eastern nations facing attacks from Iranian kamikaze drones, but insists on receiving money a...

item.title: Manchester United Beat Aston Villa as Fulham and Leeds Draw in Premier League
item.description: Manchester United don secure big 3-1 win against Aston Villa for Old Trafford on Sunday, March 15, wey dey help dem chase Champions League spot. Na second half game dem break the deadlock after dem st...

item.title: Guardiola Says Man City Struggling Without Haaland’s Goals After West Ham Match
item.description: Manager Pep Guardiola of Manchester City don admit say him team dey feel the absence of striker Erling Haaland for their recent 1-1 draw against West Ham United. This match for London Stadium cause Ci...

item.title: Kerala Police Arrest All Ten Suspects in Daylight Killing of ‘Aluva Athul’
item.description: In a prompt and well-coordinated action, the Kerala police have arrested all ten individuals implicated in the daylight murder of notorious gang leader ‘Aluva Athul’. The victim, who had recently secu...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs return to winning ways with narrow 1-0 win over Durban City
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs finally ended a frustrating four-game losing streak with a narrow 1-0 victory over Durban City at FNB Stadium on Saturday. Glody Lilepo’s goal in the 69th minute proved decisive, giving ...

item.description: The Age presents its Superquiz for Monday, March 16, 2026, offering readers an engaging way to test their knowledge and enjoy a quick mental challenge. The article highlights the availability of a Min...

item.title: Pakistan to Export Surplus Food to Gulf Countries While Safeguarding Domestic Supply
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has instructed the concerned authorities to devise a strategy for exporting surplus food items to Gulf countries, making sure that Pakistan's domestic food needs are not ...

item.title: Ramesh Chennithala Confirms UDF Unity and Readiness Ahead of Kerala Assembly Polls
item.description: Senior Congress leader Ramesh Chennithala stated on Sunday that the United Democratic Front (UDF) is fully united and prepared to contest the upcoming Kerala Assembly elections. Speaking in Guruvayur,...

item.title: UK Government Prepares for Energy Bill Intervention Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: Shadow Energy Secretary Ed Miliband has indicated that the UK government is prepared to intervene on energy bills and fuel duty if the ongoing conflict in Iran leads to a significant surge in prices. ...

item.title: TikTok Explains How E Dey Handle Content, Safety, and Government Requests in Nigeria
item.description: Tokunbo Ibrahim, wey be TikTok Head of Government Relations and Public Policy for Sub-Saharan Africa, don yarn how TikTok dey manage their operations for Nigeria and other African markets, especially ...

item.title: Fragment of Iranian Missile Strikes Residential Building Used by US Consul in Israel
item.description: According to reports from Israeli media on Sunday, March 15, 2026, a fragment from an Iranian missile struck a residential building that is used by the United States consul in Israel. This incident ha...
